content.text:
{
  "resources": [
    {
      "name": "Micah 6 Food Pantry (University Presbyterian Church)",
      "addresses": [
        "2203 San Antonio St, Austin, TX 78705"
      ],
      "phones": [
        "512-476-5321"
      ],
      "emails": [],
      "website": "https://www.micah6austin.org/food-pantry",
      "description": "All are welcome; serves low-income individuals and families needing food assistance, no geographic or documentation restrictions noted. Client-choice food pantry offering fresh produce, staples, canned goods, bread, and sometimes meat, milk, and eggs. Shoppers may visit once per week during pantry hours; no appointment is required. Current shopping hours listed as Thursdays 5:30 PM–7:00 PM and Saturdays 9:30 AM–11:00 AM in the lower level of University Presbyterian Church. First-time visitors complete a brief registration, and annual re-registration may be requested. Located near downtown/UT campus, accessible by bus from central Austin.",
      "justification": "Client is in 78701; this pantry is roughly 1–2 miles from downtown, is a Central Texas Food Bank partner, has clear open hours, serves anyone in need, and does not require appointments, making it a highly accessible nearby option.",
      "referral_type": "external",
      "availability_status": "Open during posted pantry hours; no appointment necessary",
      "distance_miles": 1.5
    },
    {
      "name": "Central Texas Food Bank – Find Food Now (multiple nearby pantries)",
      "addresses": [
        "6500 Metropolis Dr, Austin, TX 78744"
      ],
      "phones": [
        "512-282-2111"
      ],
      "emails": [],
      "website": "https://www.centraltexasfoodbank.org/find-food-now",
      "description": "Serves anyone in need of food across Central Texas; no referral required. The ‘Find Food Now’ tool provides the most accurate, up-to-date list of food pantries, mobile food pantries, and other food access sites by ZIP code, including 78701 and nearby areas. Users can search by location and see hours, drive-thru or walk-up formats, and any special requirements. Many listed partners are within a short distance of downtown Austin and may offer different days and times than Micah 6, which can help clients piece together ongoing food support.",
      "justification": "Client requested food help near 78701; this is the primary regional food bank’s official locator for nearby pantries and mobile distributions, ensuring the case manager can identify multiple options in close proximity and confirm up-to-date schedules.",
      "referral_type": "external",
      "availability_status": "Availability varies by partner site; check specific listings for current status",
      "distance_miles": 6.0
    },
    {
      "name": "Angel House Soup Kitchen (Austin Baptist Chapel)",
      "addresses": [
        "908 E Cesar Chavez St, Austin, TX 78702"
      ],
      "phones": [
        "512-643-2327"
      ],
      "emails": [],
      "website": "https://www.austinbaptistchapel.com",
      "description": "Provides free prepared meals to anyone in need; no stated residency, income, or documentation requirements. Operates a soup kitchen ministry (Angel House) serving individuals experiencing hunger, including those who are unhoused or very low income, in the central Austin area just east of downtown. The website lists this as the physical address for meal services and notes that email is preferred for volunteering or donations. Clients can walk up from 78701 or access by bus. Case manager should confirm current meal times by phone or website, as schedules can change.",
      "justification": "Located less than 2 miles from 78701 and specifically operates a soup kitchen for people experiencing hunger, making it a relevant nearby option for immediate prepared meals rather than groceries.",
      "referral_type": "external",
      "availability_status": "Appears active; verify current meal schedule before sending client",
      "distance_miles": 1.3
    }
